2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch renames two io_uring functions to better reflect their purpose and prepare for future changes. The function `io_buffer_register_bvec()` is renamed to `io_buffer_register_request()`, which will be used for registering buffers through a struct request. A subsequent patch will reuse the original name for direct bvec registration. Additionally, `io_buffer_unregister_bvec()` is renamed to `io_buffer_unregister()` to make it more generic and applicable to both buffer types. These changes are part of an effort to support kernel-populated buffers in fuse io-uring.
